profile.bio: Marketplace-hosted TikTok scraping powered by Apify.

service.name: TikTok Scraper
service.tagline: Run Apify TikTok scraping through a Fast-native async proxy.
service.about: TikTok Scraper starts the Apify TikTok actor through a marketplace-hosted async wrapper. Buyers pay on Fast and retrieve the completed dataset through the marketplace job flow.
service.promptIntro: I want to use the TikTok Scraper service on Fast Marketplace.
setupInstructions: Fund a Fast wallet on mainnet.
Call the paid run route with your actor input.
Keep the returned job token and poll the marketplace job route for completion.

endpoints.title: Run Scraper
endpoints.description: Start an async TikTok scraping job through the Apify wrapper.
endpoints.usageNotes: The marketplace returns a job token immediately and stores the completed actor output on the job record.
